name: Felix Cat Pouch 85g Chicken
shortDescription: Satisfy your cat’s appetite with FELIX Chicken Cat Pouch 85g , featuring soft, meaty chicken pieces immersed in savory jelly . Formulated as a complete meal , it contains the perfect balance of nutrients, vitamins, minerals, and Omega-6 to maintain your cat’s overall health and vitality. Easy to serve and loved by cats, FELIX Chicken Pouch combines wholesome nutrition with irresistible flavor for happy, energetic cats every day.
description: Felix with Chicken is the ultimate choice for discerning cats who demand both flavor and nutrition in their meals. Ingredients: Chicken and animal derivatives, vegetable protein extracts, minerals, various sugars. Analytical Constituents: Moisture: 82.0% Protein: 11.5% Fat content: 2.5% Crude ash: 2.5% Crude fibres: 0.05% Linoleic acid (Omega-6): 0.4% Metabolizable Energy: 67 kcal/100g Key Benefits: Made with juicy chicken pieces in tasty jelly Packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and Omega-6 for overall health and vitality 100% complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats Supports sterilized cats’ dietary needs Variety-packed range keeps mealtimes exciting Feeding Guide: For an average 4kg adult cat, feed 3–4 pouches per day split into 2 or more meals. Adjust as needed to maintain ideal weight. Serve at room temperature. Always provide fresh water.
